name: insforge
description: InsForge skills for building AI-native apps with Postgres, auth, storage, compute, hosting, AI gateway, realtime, payments, integrations, and diagnostics.

interface.longDescription: Use InsForge skills to build full-stack applications with InsForge Backend-as-a-Service. The plugin covers app integration with `@insforge/sdk`, CLI infrastructure workflows, diagnostics, and third-party auth or payment integrations across database, auth, storage, functions, AI, realtime, email, payments, deployments, and RLS.
defaultPrompt: Use InsForge to add authentication and database CRUD to this app.
Use InsForge CLI to create tables, RLS policies, and deploy functions.
Use InsForge Debug to diagnose this backend error.
